meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve slow development speed (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome slow development speed. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Workflow: How to Crush Slow Development Speeds
content.seo_description: Master your freelance development workflow. Use this advanced checklist to eliminate bottlenecks with Antigravity and Claude Code for rapid, high-quality shipping.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, you must shift from manual coding to agentic orchestration. By integrating Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative implementation, you automate the mundane, reduce context switching, and maintain a high-velocity feedback loop that allows you to ship production-ready features for clients in record time.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is refreshing their email, and your codebase feels like it's stuck in quicksand. You’re trapped in the 'boilerplate tax'—spending hours on setup instead of solving the core business logic that actually pays the bills. It’s a silent killer of freelance careers, turning high-value developers into glorified code-monkeys.

But the tide is turning. By weaponizing modern agentic workflows, you can compress weeks of labor into days. This isn't just about faster typing; it's about shifting your role from a line-item coder to an AI-orchestrated architect. Let's dismantle your bottlenecks and rebuild your workflow for maximum output.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Stop manual file creation. Use Antigravity to define the project structure, dependencies, and core patterns before writing a single line of business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust, scalable Next.js project structure with Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, and a modular architecture pattern suitable for a high-traffic SaaS client.

steps.title: Automated Context Injection
steps.description: Ensure your AI agents understand the client's specific business domain by injecting documentation and existing constraints into the working context.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the project requirements document and map out the necessary API endpoints and database schema, ensuring all naming conventions align with the current project style guide.

steps.title: Iterative Feature Implementation
steps.description: Break complex features into micro-tasks. Let Claude Code handle the heavy lifting while you verify the output quality at each milestone.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure authentication flow using NextAuth, integrating with Supabase, following best practices for production-grade security and error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "implement protected route middleware with role-based access control"

steps.title: Automated Testing & Validation
steps.description: Never ship untested code. Use agents to generate unit tests that validate your newly implemented logic against edge cases immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate comprehensive Jest test suites for the newly created authentication modules, covering happy paths and common failure scenarios.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate unit tests for auth/middleware.ts"

steps.title: Documentation & Delivery
steps.description: Close the loop by generating professional READMEs and API docs automatically, ensuring your client receives a polished, maintainable asset.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase and generate a comprehensive README.md and API documentation file that explains how to deploy and maintain this project.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "create documentation for all new endpoints and update README"

pro_tips: Always define a 'Global Context File' that agents read first; this reduces hallucinations by 80%.
Use Claude Code's CLI 'review' command before every commit to catch logic errors before they hit your git history.
Map your client's specific naming conventions in an Antigravity config file to ensure consistent output across multiple projects.
Treat your agentic workflow like a CI/CD pipeline: automate the feedback loop, not just the code generation.
When a feature fails, don't re-prompt; feed the error stack trace back into Claude Code for instant, context-aware debugging.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully automated your first feature, perform a 'Velocity Audit' to compare your manual ship time versus your AI-assisted time. Use that delta to justify higher rates to your clients.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to outpace your competition and deliver premium value without the burnout. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
